title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
